programs.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programs.desc: Mateo is saved by Z-Blob who has returned to unbox him from Dreamsmasher’s prison. The two dream chasers unbox the rest of their team and wreak havoc in the GLOWING ORB in order to try and retrieve Lunia’s hourglass and save the dream world from harm. But not everything is as it appears, as Mateo’s plan seems to go more smoothly than he had imagined.

programs.title: Bubble's Hotel
programs.sub_title: Fly Fly Away/ And Baby Makes Seven/Delicate Problem/Beach Burglar
programs.desc: When Bubble learns that her guest Dash has butterfly-phobia, she endeavours to help Dash overcome her fears. / Bubble helps Lotus protect her precious rare coral plant from a destructive seahorse.

programs.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programs.desc: What exactly is a battle camp? Well, Bel, Ranzo, and Pri are about to find out because they've been invited to Battle Island where rookie Bladers from all over have gathered to train and compete!

programs.title: Beyblade X
programs.desc: The First Battle of Persona vs. Gordias is a leader match between Robin and Karla. The curse Reiyu placed on Robin crosses the back of his mind...! Tenka discloses the truth behind the curse.

programs.title: LEGO City Adventures
programs.desc: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled. Billy and Madison lose a flying disc inside a creepy-looking house.

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: Barbie and her friends try to wow Nikki's fashion idol at a mermaid convention, but things take a fishy turn when Barbie's sisters become suspects in a mystery.
